scenarios.description: isFormSubmittable() returns false when a known form-submittable tag is requested with a non-matching namespace leading to a new generic tag
scenarios.precondition: Parser.NamespaceHtml tag 'input' is registered with formSubmit=true
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is false on the newly created Tag with formSubmit=false
pseudocode: // Arrange: correct tagName but wrong namespace
// Assert: namespace mismatch leads to new generic tag with formSubmit default false
